description: Building scalable and maintainable applications within a distributed engineering team. Focus on backend systems, API design, and performance optimization. Contributing to open-source tooling and internal platform improvements.

Led development of the company landing site and internal tools. Improved organic reach by 80% through technical SEO, performance tuning, and structured data. Deployed on DigitalOcean with CI/CD pipelines.
Migrated 200+ legacy APIs from Core PHP to Node.js with TypeScript. Established API design conventions, monitoring, and testing standards. Deployed applications on DigitalOcean and Vercel.
